titleStmt.title: SII 28.143: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 143. (A.R. No. 298 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records that on the representation of Pottappichchōḻaṉ and Kārāṇai Viḻuppēra[ra*]yaṉ, the king ordered the following record of benefaction made after purchase of land, to be inscribed in the tiru-māḷigai of Āḷuḍaiyārkōyil and that the purchase deeds (vilai-koṇḍa-pramāṇam) might be deposited in the respective store-houses (paṇḍāram).

The benefaction was an endowment of plots of land, both agricultural land (viḷai-nilam) and garden kitchen land (kollai-nilam) after purchase, for raising a flower garden for the supply of flowers to God Āḷuḍaiya-nāyaṉār and for the support and maintenance (ilakkai and koṟṟu) of those tending the garden. The fund (mudal) for the latter purpose was to be raised from the balance of the yield of the land endowed (obviously the land other than that on which the garden stood) after paying the kaḍamai (taxes) as fixed by the ūr (ūr-māvinda) and doing the kuḍimai (services that were expected to be done by the landholders/inhabitants ?) in respect of those plots.

The garden was set up in Śivapuri alias Rājēndrachōḻa-nallūr, a hamlet (piḍāgai) of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr, a taṉiyūr in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu by Tyāgapperumāḷ in the name of (pēril) Perumāṉambi alias Veḷḷappanāḍāḻvāṉ, the sēnāpati (commander) of the regiment called Rājarājanterinda-vil.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyuṅ karuvūrum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉmuṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi virābhiṣekamum vijayābhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiṉa
tribhuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 4 Āvatu nāḷ 4 10 5ṉāl toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum mathurān=taka brahmārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉā koyilu
kkuc cāmutāyat tirumāḷikaik kūṟu tillaiyampalap pallavarayaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum
tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkut tiruppaḷḷit tāmat tirunantavaṉa
rukkum peṇṭukaḷil tiyākapperumāḷ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai civapuriyāṉa rājendracoḻanallūrile rājarāja
ṉ terinta villukku senāpati perumāṉampiyāṉa veḷḷappa nāṭāḻvāṉ peril vaṭakaṇṇamaṅkala muṭaiyāṉuyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉu kāṇa
ṭi Āṇṭāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa viḷainilattukkum kollai nilattukku melellaiyāvatu tirucciṟṟampalavatikkuk kiḻakkuk kaṇapati vāykkālukkut teṟ
ku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñcatirattu tīyppāñcāḷāṉa kiḻakkaṭaiya niṉṟa viḷākameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam melpāṟkellai civapuravāykkālu
kkuk kiḻakku karuṅkaḷilāṟṟukkut teṟku Irāciṅkarāyaṉ ciṟapput tirunantavaṉappuṟattukku meṟkum cammānta vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Ivvi
cainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilu muṭppaṭṭa nilam Oṉpatu māvarai Itil nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl nilam nālumā mukkāṇiyum Iṅke pa� Eṉṟu per kūvappa
ṭṭa nilam Irāciṅkarāyaṉ tirunantavaṉappuṟattukkuk kiḻakkukkum teṟkum mayilaik kavuciyaṉ poṉṉampalak kuttaṉ pirāmaṇi muttāra nilattukku meṟkum
cammātavāykkālukku vaṭakkum Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum Ūrppiṭāṉeṉpāṉoruvaṉ Ittirunantavaṉattukkāḷāy viḷainilam Eḻuon the next line.
māmukkāṇiyum kaikkoṇṭu viḷainilattukkum kollai nilattukkum Ūrmāvīntakaṭamai Iṟuttuk kuṭimaiyuñ ceytu Iṟaimikuti Ilakkaik
kum koṟṟukkumuṭalākak koṇṭu tirunantavaṉañ ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmamumaḷakka kaṭavaṉāka Innilam viṭṭāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭikku Āḷuṭaiyār ko
yiṟ ṟirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum Innilam vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇaṅkaḷum mulappiramāṇaṅkaḷum Oṭukkavum ka
ṭavatākappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu pottappiccoḻaṉum kārāṇai viḻupperarayaṉum namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭic ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi
ceyyappaṇṇuvatu .
Digital edition of SII 28.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
